scripts.test: npm run encode && npm run decode
scripts.test:row: npm run encode:row && npm run decode:row
scripts.encode:strip: npx ts-node text2pix.ts index.html --placement strip --strip-height 1024 --output index.strip
scripts.test:strip: npm run encode:strip && npm run decode:strip
scripts.encode:hilbert: npx ts-node text2pix.ts index.html --placement hilbert --output index.hilbert
scripts.test:hilbert: npm run encode:hilbert && npm run decode:hilbert
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:row && npm run test:strip && npm run test:hilbert
